experiment: ED0-D8: ResNet34-U-Net + bottleneck downsample-to-8 context + CBSA + MKDC
note: Architecture is based on P2. A residual bottleneck context module is inserted after the deepest ResNet34 encoder feature. It downsamples 16x16 to 8x8 and upsamples back before the original decoder. Input processing, loss, CBSA and MKDC remain unchanged.
